name: Sprout
description: Seedlings standing in nursery rows, every stem unfurling its first leaf — redraws regrow the bed a little differently each time.

code.style: --shoot: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( border-bottom: calc(40px / @Y) solid var(--color4); box-sizing: border-box; /* stem and leaf share one emitted green and height; the leaf's side flips with one emitted sign */ --gr: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --sh: @r(34, 62); --side: @p(-1, 1); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 48.5%; width: 3%; bottom: 0; height: calc(@var(--sh) * 1%); border-radius: 99px 99px 0 0; background: @var(--gr); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transform: rotate(@rand(-7deg, 7deg)); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(16%, 26%); left: calc(50% + @var(--side) * 14% - 11%); bottom: calc(@var(--sh) * 1% - 10%); border-radius: 0 100% 0 100%; background: var(--shoot); transform: rotate(calc(@var(--side) * @rand(10deg, 40deg))); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
